samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD">6'b100000</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU">6'b100001</constant>
        <constant id="SUB">6'b100010</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU">6'b100011</constant>
        <constant id="AND">6'b100100</constant>
        <constant id="OR">6'b100101</constant>
        <constant id="XOR">6'b100110</constant>
        <constant id="NOR">6'b100111</constant>
        <constant id="SLT">6'b101010</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU">6'b101011</constant>
        <constant id="SLL">6'b000000</constant>
        <constant id="SRL">6'b000010</constant>
        <constant id="SRA">6'b000011</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV">6'b000100</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV">6'b000110</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV">6'b000111</constant>
        <constant id="LUI">6'b001111</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="r" expression="res[31:0]" />
        <assign id="zero" expression="(res == 32'h00000000)" />
        <assign id="carry" expression="res[32]" />
        <assign id="negative" expression="res[31]" />
        <assign id="overflow" expression="((a[31] & ~b[31]) | (~a[31] & b[31])) & ((~a[31] & ~b[31] & res[31]) | (a[31] & b[31] & ~res[31]))" />
        <assign id="flag" expression="(aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1 : z" />
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Define parameters for each operation
        parameter ADD = 6'b100000;
        parameter ADDU = 6'b100001;
        parameter SUB = 6'b100010;
        parameter SUBU = 6'b100011;
        parameter AND = 6'b100100;
        parameter OR = 6'b100101;
        parameter XOR = 6'b100110;
        parameter NOR = 6'b100111;
        parameter SLT = 6'b101010;
        parameter SLTU = 6'b101011;
        parameter SLL = 6'b000000;
        parameter SRL = 6'b000010;
        parameter SRA = 6'b000011;
        parameter SLLV = 6'b000100;
        parameter SRLV = 6'b000110;
        parameter SRAV = 6'b000111;
        parameter LUI = 6'b001111;
        
        // Declare wires and registers
        wire [31:0] a_signed, b_signed;
        reg [32:0] res;
        
        // Assign inputs to signed wires
        assign a_signed = $signed(a);
        assign b_signed = $signed(b);
        
        // Perform operations based on control signal
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= a + b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= a - b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= a & b;
                OR: res <= a | b;
                XOR: res <= a ^ b;
                NOR: res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT: res <= {1'b0, (a_signed < b_signed)};
                SLTU: res <= {1'b0, (a < b)};
                SLL: res <= {a, 32'b0} << b[4:0];
                SRL: res <= {32'b0, a} >> b[4:0];
                SRA: res <= {{(32-b[4:0]){a[31]}}, a} >> b[4:0];
                SLLV: res <= {a, 32'b0} << b[4:0];
                SRLV: res <= {32'b0, a} >> b[4:0];
                SRAV: res <= {{(32-b[4:0]){a[31]}}, a} >> b[4:0];
                LUI: res <= {a[15:0], 16'b0};
                default: res <= 33'hzzzzzzzzzz;
            endcase
        end
        
        // Assign outputs
        assign r = res[31:0];
        assign zero = (res == 32'h00000000);
        assign carry = res[32];
        assign negative = res[31];
        assign overflow = ((a[31] & ~b[31]) | (~a[31] & b[31])) & ((~a[31] & ~b[31] & res[31]) | (a[31] & b[31] & ~res[31]));
        assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1 : z;
    </implementation>
</module>
